claim_boundary: Ellipticals require a separate observable mapping. This is an ATLAS3D pressure-channel proxy, not v_flat, not A_gov_inferred, not a disk BDVR activation, and not direct lensing/X-ray/dynamical-excess validation.
falsification_rules: The pressure-channel extension is challenged if slow rotators do not have higher median pressure response than fast rotators.
The spheroid mapping remains incomplete until true dynamical-excess/lensing/X-ray mass observables are tested.
The pressure framing is invalid if reported as disk v_flat or A_gov_inferred.
primary_result: Computed ATLAS3D pressure-channel proxy for 260 early-type galaxies. Spearman(pressure response, pressure_support)=0.814; Spearman(pressure response, stellar_surface_density)=0.302; Spearman(pressure response, lambda_R)=-0.817; median slow-rotator pressure response=0.7499999999999999; median fast-rotator pressure response=0.4692307692307692.
warnings: ATLAS3D scalar data lack direct lensing/X-ray/dark-matter-fraction columns; this is a pressure support proxy only.
virial_sigma_star_proxy_km_s is derived from stellar mass proxy and effective radius, not an observed central sigma.
Do not combine this with disk BDVR v_flat language.
